prices.source_phrase: Adults, $15 | Seniors, Students, Military (with ID), Children 6-12, $10 Children under 6 are free.
prices.source_block: Adults, $15 | Seniors, Students, Military (with ID), Children 6-12, $10 Children under 6 are free. Museum Members are always free. Free admission for NARM and ROAM participants. We invite you to consider becoming a Museum Member to enjoy year round benefits to the Museum.

hours.source_phrase: The Museum is open 10 AM - 3 PM, Tuesday through Sunday.
hours.source_block: The Museum is open 10 AM - 3 PM, Tuesday through Sunday. Our weekly schedule can be viewed below. Holidays (closed): New Years Day: January 1 Independence Day: July 4 Thanksgiving Day: Fourth Thursday of November Christmas Day: December 25
